title: Set Clear Goals
description: Break your learning into weekly milestones to track progress consistently and stay motivated.

title: Manage Your Time
description: Dedicate 1-2 hours daily. Consistent short sessions beat marathon cramming every time.

title: Practice Actively
description: Build projects alongside watching lessons. Hands-on practice beats passive reading always.

title: Take Notes
description: Write down key concepts in your own words. Teaching yourself is the best way to learn.

title: Join the Community
description: Connect with fellow learners, ask questions and share your progress to stay accountable.

title: Review Regularly
description: Revisit previous lessons weekly. Spaced repetition is the key to long-term retention.
